description: Manages Okta Identity Governance entitlement discovery, catalogs, and role-based bundles. Entitlements are the fine-grained permissions within applications (e.g., Salesforce roles, AWS IAM policies, GitHub team memberships). This module controls how entitlements are discovered, organized, and made available for access requests and certifications.
terraform_support_notes: Entitlement discovery and sync configuration require the OIG Governance API (v2024.06+). This module models entitlement bundles as Okta groups (fully supported) and creates an ACCESS_POLICY shell for entitlement management settings. Discovery configuration, sync intervals, and entitlement-to-application mapping require API calls or admin console setup.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Entitlement discovery enabled with 24-hour sync. Bundles disabled by default (flat entitlement list).
risk_profile_effects.elevated: 12-hour sync interval. Entitlement bundles enabled for role-based access modeling.
risk_profile_effects.strict: 6-hour sync interval. Bundles enabled. All entitlements must be cataloged before they can be assigned.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Controls entitlement sync frequency and whether role-based bundles are enabled.

enable_entitlement_discovery.label: Enable Entitlement Discovery
enable_entitlement_discovery.client_description: Automatically discover entitlements (roles, permissions, groups) from connected applications. Required for OIG to know what access exists in your environment.

entitlement_sync_interval_hours.label: Sync Interval (hours)
entitlement_sync_interval_hours.client_description: How often OIG re-syncs entitlements from connected applications. Shorter intervals catch permission changes faster but increase API load. 24 hours is fine for most orgs. 6 hours recommended for environments with frequent permission changes.

enable_entitlement_bundles.label: Enable Entitlement Bundles
enable_entitlement_bundles.client_description: Group individual entitlements into role-based bundles. For example, a 'Sales Engineer' bundle might include Salesforce CRM access, Slack channels, and GitHub repo access. Users request the bundle instead of individual entitlements.

entitlement_bundles.label: Entitlement Bundles
entitlement_bundles.client_description: Define role-based bundles mapping a role name to a set of entitlements. Each bundle becomes a requestable item in the access request catalog.

outputs.entitlement_policy_id: Entitlement management policy ID. Null if discovery is disabled.
outputs.entitlement_bundle_group_ids: Map of bundle names to their Okta group IDs.
